briefs.title: BC Port Property Tax Designations Updated for 2026 Taxation Year
briefs.summary: BC has amended the Eligible Port Property Designation Regulation to update the assessment roll designations for the 2026 taxation year, replacing the 2025 schedule with new designated port properties assessed as at December 31, 2025.
briefs.action_required: Confirm whether your port property appears on the updated 2026 designation schedule to verify your tax eligibility.

key_dates.label: BC Eligible Port Property Designation Regulation 2026 taxation year takes effect

briefs.industries: Transportation & Logistics, Agriculture, Landlord & Property Mgmt
